title: Helianthocereus andalgalensis
taxonomy: Helianthocereus andalgalensis is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a genus of cacti that is native to South America. The classification of Helianthocereus andalgalensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Magnoliophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Cactaceae, Genus: Helianthocereus, Species: H. andalgalensis. The classification of this plant is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. Its classification as a species within the family Cactaceae is well-established in botanical literature.
